message:
fix(salesforce): escape SOQL string literals to prevent injection, continue fcp-kernel import migration in host tests

salesforce/client.rs: Add escape_soql_string() that doubles backslashes
and escapes single quotes for safe SOQL literal interpolation.  Applied
to AccountId filter in list_contacts and Status filter in list_leads.

fcp-host tests: Continue fcp-core to fcp-kernel import migration in
no_mock_integration.rs and rate_limit_integration.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
